text.title: Data-Driven Requirements Engineering Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml or to the universal skip-this-methodology conclusion.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the requirement have a measurable success target with baseline?

conclusion.verdict: Apply full data-driven contract: BR + baseline + target + instrumentation.
Add instrumentation step first; defer the requirement until baseline captured.
Mandate is the driver; document compliance reference, not ROI.
Use hypothesis-driven (Lean Startup); no baseline exists to anchor.
Use RICE/WSJF scoring with baseline + target as inputs; ban stakeholder-seniority weighting.

example.description: When the situation matches the leading branch, apply the referenced rule; otherwise traverse to the next condition until the default branch is reached.
